disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset ~12h ago of high-frequency, high-volume watery diarrhoea (>10 episodes)
trigger_question_examples: When did this start and how many times have you been?
What do the stools look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started about 12 hours ago with nausea, then just pure watery diarrhoea — I've been more than ten times already and it won't stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lightheadedness and near-collapse on standing — orthostatic symptoms suggesting volume depletion
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint, especially when you stand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — every time I stand I go really dizzy and nearly collapse. I have to hold onto things. I feel like I might faint.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Failing to maintain oral intake against losses, extreme thirst and reduced/dark urine output
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep fluids down, and how much are you drinking?
When did you last pass urine and what did it look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm so thirsty but I can't keep up — it comes straight out. I've hardly weed all day and it was really dark.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe crampy abdominal pain with faecal urgency and tenesmus
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the tummy pain — where is it and what is it like?
Do you feel like you still need to go even when nothing comes out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My belly is cramping in knots, low down, and I keep feeling I desperately need to go even when there's nothing left.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No visible blood or mucus in the stool; no recent travel; no known sick contacts
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood or mucus in the toilet?
Any recent travel or anyone around you unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blood or slime that I've seen. No travel, and no one around me has been sick.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Self-medicated with OTC loperamide about 2 hours ago with no effect
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it yourself?
Did the chemist medicine help at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took some Imodium from the chemist a couple of hours ago but it did absolutely nothing.
